data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin all rise as key crypto bills pass through US House. Prices: BTC $119,524.79, ETH $3,477.42, DOGE $0.2192. BTC nears $121,000, Ethereum hits 8-month high at $3,500. Legislative bill updates positive for crypto industry. Liquidations at $607M in 24 hours.
data.description: Cryptocurrencies saw a rise following the passing of important bills by the House of Representatives to address regulatory uncertainties in the industry. As of 9:20 p.m. ET, Bitcoin was up by 0.50% at $119,524.79, Ethereum rose by 2.52% to $3,477.42, and Dogecoin increased by 1.40% to $0.2192. Bitcoin neared $121,000 and Ethereum surpassed $3,500, reaching an eight-month high. Bitcoin's dominance dropped to 61%, while Ethereum's market share exceeded 11%. The House approved bills like the GENIUS Act, which awaits President Trump's signature, and the CLARITY Act heading to the Senate. Cryptocurrency liquidations totaled $607 million in the last 24 hours.
Australia Plans To Issue A$150 Million In 2030 Treasury Indexed Bonds On July 24
China's Commerce Minister stated that the greater the challenges, the more clearly China's institutional advantages become apparent.

data.title: Mirandus update: Gala Games introduces pets with unique abilities and gameplay features, including revamped inventory system and Goblin Brutes.
data.description: Gala Games has introduced exciting new updates for their game Mirandus. The updates bring pets with special abilities into the game, enhancing gameplay. The new features also include a redesigned inventory system and the addition of powerful Goblin Brutes. These updates are expected to provide players with a fresh and engaging experience.
Indonesia stocks climbed 1.1% to 7,364.031 points, reaching their highest level since December 13, 2024.
